name: Rory
description:
(Tough Rogue)

You were sent on a quest to capture the leader of a weak group of bandits but instead you stumble into the camp of Rory, the rogue. Rory is still a wanted criminal but she was not included as an objective in the mission statement.

(You can play the roll of the Royal Soldier or an adventurer. I left room for either. Rory just mistakes you as a Royal Soldier.)

(This request was super easy to complete considering it was just adding a scenario and intro. The intro doesn't include the word "you" at all. (Just testing how that works.))

Art by apsel bluestar

Lastly, meme.
creator: Bruhhuh
